projectDescription: A browser-based static web app for synchronized multi-stem music rehearsal, featuring per-stem mute/solo/volume controls, waveform visualization, global transpose, tempo, lyrics, chord charts, and offline PWA support.
keyFeatures: Synchronized multi-stem playback (vocals, guitar, strings, drums, bass, fx, other)
Per-stem mute, solo, and volume controls with live LED meters
Global transpose via SoundTouch AudioWorklet (real-time on desktop, render mode on mobile)
Waveform visualization with WaveSurfer.js and precomputed peak files
Section markers for instant song navigation
Lyrics viewer and structured chord chart display
Low-memory Lite mode (mono/22 kHz decode) for mobile devices
Installable PWA with offline caching and Media Session / Wake Lock support
Space bar keyboard shortcut for play/pause
Static SvelteKit build — no server or auth required
